title: Define Color Box Properties
text: Define Color Box Properties Define the properties of the Color Box widget. For more information, see colorbox . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Color Handling The objects that make up an application's user interface have color properties that determine foreground and background colors. These properties can be set in the Uniface IDE when defining each object, but they can also be set dynamically using ProcScript. Depending on the property, you can specify an object's color as a system color name, web color name, or RGB value (expressed as decimal or hexadecimal values). Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
